title: Smaller Totem
body:
![Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8eacdd6a7fb69be02559bdd57c020b17ab48fe44_0.webp)
Makes the **Totem of Undying smaller** and **lower** in view, so it doesn't take up too much **space**.
___
[![Smaller Shield](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/070b37ba08153507ca182614fcd3f6a04bb588fd.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/smaller-shield)
[![Even Smaller Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/584c671228f500d6dfc3d21dd1a76e60609e1e5b.png)](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/evensmallertotem)
